title: Timeline Dependency Question
excerpt:
What exactly is this automation going to do to the “due date” based on Timeline? 
 
Thanks!

posts.author: Brando (Brandon Cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
What exactly is this automation going to do to the “due date” based on Timeline?

image1608×204 16.4 KB

Thanks!

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Brando, good question, thanks for posting!

If you adjust the timeline, the “Perf. Review” column will also change. For example, if you push the timeline end date 2 days later, then the Perf Review due date will be moved 2 days later. Similarly, if you adjust the timeline end date to be 3 days earlier, then the due date will be moved 3 days earlier as well.

What do you think? Let me know if this helps clarify!
